# UIM fixtures

Synthetic Wacom Universal Ink Model `.uim` files for `tests/test_uim.py`,
generated by `make_fixture.py` in this directory:

```sh
cd core
uv run --with universal-ink-library python tests/fixtures/uim/make_fixture.py
```

- `two-strokes-pressure.uim` — UIM v3.1.0, two strokes with known
  geometry and full sensor channels (pressure, timestamp, azimuth,
  altitude):
  - stroke 1: 10-point diagonal sine wave, blue, per-point size
    2.0..3.8 (variable width), pressure ramp 0.30..0.75;
  - stroke 2: 5-point horizontal line, red at alpha 0.5, constant
    size 8.0, brush named `FixtureHighlighter`.

## Provenance

These are NOT files from a real device or app and contain no third-party
ink data. The generator builds the ink model programmatically and encodes
it with Wacom's own reference implementation (PyPI
`universal-ink-library`, v2.1.1 at generation time, Apache-2.0), so the
fixture is spec-conformant by construction and our independent reader is
tested against Wacom's writer rather than against itself.

## Attribution

Format knowledge derives from Wacom's `universal-ink-library`
(github.com/Wacom-Developer/universal-ink-library), licensed under the
Apache License 2.0. The fixture files themselves are CC0-1.0.
